description:
## Goal

The refresh loop and its extracted siblings use **scattered magic timeouts** that are hard to tune, document, and reason about. Group them as named module constants in a single place.

## Magic numbers found in src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr

| Magic value            | Current location                                                | Suggested name                       |
| ---------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| `10.minutes`           | `fetch_feeds_concurrently` â€” `overall_timeout`                  | `OVERALL_FETCH_TIMEOUT`              |
| `5.minutes`            | `start_health_reporter` â€” health reporter interval              | `HEALTH_REPORT_INTERVAL`             |
| `60.seconds`           | `start` rescue â€” restart delay after unhandled exception        | `RESTART_DELAY_AFTER_ERROR`          |
| `30.seconds`           | `interruptible_sleep` â€” default chunk                           | `DEFAULT_SLEEP_CHUNK`                |
| `QuickHeadlines::Constants::FETCH_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | `fetch_single_feed_with_timeout` | already named, OK as is |
| `state.outer_timeout_seconds * 3 // 2` | `state.outer_timeout_seconds`         | OK, computed from refresh_minutes    |
| `state.sleep_timeout_seconds * 3 // 2` | `state.sleep_timeout_seconds`         | OK, computed from refresh_minutes    |
| `state.stuck_threshold_seconds * 3`   | `state.stuck_threshold_seconds`       | OK, computed from refresh_minutes    |
| `state.heartbeat_interval = 10`       | `state.heartbeat_interval`            | OK as a member, but should be a const |

## Where they should live

Add a top section to each new file (semaphore_pool, feed_fetcher_concurrent, refresh_supervisor, refresh_health_reporter) with the constants it owns. For values that span multiple files, put them on `RefreshLoop::Constants` (the existing module referenced as `QuickHeadlines::Constants`).

## Acceptance

- No raw `10.minutes`, `5.minutes`, `60.seconds`, `30.seconds` literals in the extracted files (unless wrapped in a constant of the same name).
- A new `RefreshLoop::Constants` module (or extension of an existing one) lists each timeout with a one-line doc comment.
- `just nix-build` succeeds.
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes.

## Notes

- Behavior must not change â€” these are pure renames.
- If `QuickHeadlines::Constants` already exists and is the right home, prefer extending it over creating a parallel `RefreshLoop::Constants`.
- Do NOT touch `state.heartbeat_interval = 10` if the value is data-derived (it might be a future knob).
title: Replace magic timeout constants in refresh_loop with named module constants
